title: KojuChat
description: A Simple but Advanced Chat-System for Folia / Paper Servers.
body:
# KojuChat
**The Complete Chat Management Solution**

**KojuChat** is a comprehensive, all-in-one chat management system for modern Minecraft servers (1.21+).

It's a professional, high-performance solution combining essential features into one plugin, with full **Folia compatibility**.



## Core Features

* **Advanced Chat Formatting:** Full **LuckPerms** prefix/suffix support, plus Legacy (`&a`), HEX (`#FF0000`), and **MiniMessage** formatting.
![Formatting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca1575fcef6994a03a66d9ae66a9bba927d1f7c.png)
* **Interactive @Mention System:** Tag players with ****@PlayerName****. This sends a sound notification and an interactive, clickable message for a quick `/pm` reply.
![Mention System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/445ae2c1c489faf3c65a80a4429ec265ab78b360.png)
* **Full Private Message System:** A complete PM solution with `/pm`, `/msg`, `/tell`, `/w`, and a smart, bidirectional `/reply` command.
![PM-System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/232e68f602ef92b1cf2b6af62d2616955075a210.png)
* **Social Spy:** Allows staff with permission (`koju.socialspy`) to toggle `/socialspy` and monitor all private messages in real-time.
* **Broadcast System:** Announce server-wide messages with `/broadcast` or `/bc`, complete with custom formatting.
![Broadcast-System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3875fa42d53bd5738ad4e930ff860d2041492f65.png)
* **Configurable Word Filter:** Keep your chat clean by censoring inappropriate content.
* **High Performance:** Built with **Folia compatibility** and a modular design for optimal performance.

---

## Commands & Permissions

| Command | Aliases | Permission | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/kojuchat` | `/kc`, `/kchat` | `koju.reload` | Reloads the plugin configuration. |
| `/broadcast` | `/bc` | `koju.broadcast` | Sends a formatted, server-wide message. |
| `/pm` | `/msg`, `/tell`, `/w` | `koju.pm` | Sends a private message to a player. |
| `/reply` | `/r` | `koju.pm` | Replies to the last received private message. |
| `/socialspy` | `/spy` | `koju.socialspy` | Toggles the social spy mode to monitor PMs. |

### Other Key Permissions
* `koju.silent`: Allows silent join/leave.
* `koju.bypass.filter`: Bypasses the word filter.
* `koju.colorcodes`: Allows color codes in chat.

---

## Installation

1.  Place `KojuChat.jar` into your server's `/plugins` folder.
2.  (Recommended) Install **LuckPerms** and **PlaceholderAPI** for full functionality. KojuChat hooks into them automatically.
3.  Start your server. Configure everything in the `/plugins/KojuChat/` folder.

### Depedencies (optional)

**We recommend** **to install Luckperms & PlaceholderAPI** **for a better experience!**

### Support
For bugs or support: https://discord.gg/Mkgz7YK7Y8
